doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The legal substance accurately reflects the ADEA, but the specific "Section 8, Effective February 2018" framing does not match the actual structure of the EEOC Compliance Manual, indicating fabricated packaging around genuine legal content.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 75
REASON: The legal substance (ADEA coverage, 20-employee threshold, age-40 protection, RFOA defense) is accurate, but the EEOC Compliance Manual does not have a "Section 8: Age Discrimination, Effective February 2018" in this form, suggesting a fabricated/paraphrased framing around real legal content.
